name: Groundnut Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds stew meat, cut into 1-inch chunks
2 tablespoons salad oil, peanut oil best
recipeInstructions:
1. In a covered medium saucepan, cook the meat with 1½ cups water, salt, and pepper for 1½ hours or until tender.
2. Meanwhile, in a covered electric blender container at low speed, blend onions and tomatoes until smooth (or chop onions and tomatoes very fine).
3. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, cook the onion-tomato mixture in hot oil for 5 minutes.
4. Add the meat mixture and peanuts, and cook about 20 minutes until the sauce cooks down slightly.
5. Serve over hot rice.
[Allegedly] 6 Servings.
Accompaniments: Pass small bowls of shredded coconut, orange segments, pineapple chunks, and fried onions to sprinkle over individual servings of stew, if desired. You can serve this with the JOLOFF RICE (See recipe JOLOFF RICE).
